objective: Save scarce or expensive model quota by spending intelligence on planning and using cheaper workers for implementation.

planner.purpose: Create a high-quality workflow plan with stages, dependencies, artifacts, verification, and budget constraints.

critic.purpose: Review the plan for ambiguity, missing verification, dependency mistakes, unsafe scope, and unnecessary premium usage.

programmer.purpose: Implement focused tasks from an approved plan.

verifier.purpose: Run deterministic checks first, then cheap model review, then premium escalation only when explicitly allowed.
